channels.F: barrier altitude; ratio=exp(F); encoded by pitch
channels.Lambda_hc: silent Act-kernel channel; should remain zero in public sonification
channels.dF: radial pull; encoded indirectly in brightness
channels.kmax: top-k cumulative excess location; recorded in CSV

interpretation: Dissonance below the barrier is harmless; dissonance at the barrier is the proof obstruction.
name: Generalized barrier sonification schema
purpose: Convert radial Talagrand barrier dynamics into a temporal invariant signal.
